Matched
0 AND 37
1 C 1n
2 C 2n
3 C 3n
4 C 4n
5 C 5n
6 C 6n
7 C 7n

Applying to 00110011
Input
I 0 = 0
I 1 = 0
I 2 = 1
I 3 = 1
I 4 = 0
I 5 = 0
I 6 = 1
I 7 = 1
Output
0 AND 37 = AND(I 3,I 7) = AND(1,1) = 1
1 C 1n = NOT(1) = 0
2 C 2n = NOT(1) = 0
3 C 3n = NOT(1) = 0
4 C 4n = NOT(1) = 0
5 C 5n = NOT(1) = 0
6 C 6n = NOT(1) = 0
7 C 7n = NOT(1) = 0

\boxed{10000000}
